## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` – New feature
- [ ] `fix` – Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` – Code refactoring (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `docs` – Documentation only
- [ ] `test` – Tests only
- [ ] `chore` – Build, CI, or tooling change
- [ ] `perf` – Performance improvement
- [ ] `revert` – Reverts a previous commit

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with the target branch (`develop` or `main` for hotfixes).
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-message-convention).
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally.
- [ ] New functionality is covered by tests.
- [ ] Public APIs or changed behaviour are documented.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data are included.
